form.formComment: Dual acceptor. He is resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign tenth of 12 at Grafton Mdn-Sw September 30 over 1400m, 21 len behind Tillstrom carrying 59kg at $151. On debut ran last of 8 at Coffs Harbour Ctry Mdn-Sw September 14 over 1215m, soft track; 8 len behind Territories Spirit with 59kg at $71. Doesn't bring the right form to the table.
